Class ProxyRequestHandler

java.lang.Object
io.fluxzero.sdk.common.AbstractNamespaced<ProxyRequestHandler>
io.fluxzero.proxy.ProxyRequestHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
Namespaced<ProxyRequestHandler>
public class ProxyRequestHandler extends AbstractNamespaced<ProxyRequestHandler>

  • Field Details

    • CORS_DOMAINS_PROPERTY

      public static final String CORS_DOMAINS_PROPERTY
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS_PROPERTY

      public static final String REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS_PROPERTY
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • REQUEST_CHUNKING_ENABLED_PROPERTY

      public static final String REQUEST_CHUNKING_ENABLED_PROPERTY
      Enables publishing large or unknown-length request bodies as chunked web request messages.

      Defaults to false for backward compatibility with applications that still run older SDK clients.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • REQUEST_CHUNK_SIZE_PROPERTY

      public static final String REQUEST_CHUNK_SIZE_PROPERTY
      Maximum payload bytes per web request chunk when REQUEST_CHUNKING_ENABLED_PROPERTY is enabled.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • BENCHMARK_TRACE_HEADERS_ENABLED_PROPERTY

      public static final String BENCHMARK_TRACE_HEADERS_ENABLED_PROPERTY
      Enables returning proxy benchmark trace headers when a request also includes BENCHMARK_TRACE_ID_HEADER.

      Use system property fluxzero.proxy.benchmark.trace.headers.enabled=true or environment variable FLUXZERO_PROXY_BENCHMARK_TRACE_HEADERS_ENABLED=true.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
